method.eyebrow: From idea to launch, no detours.
method.intro: No pointless meetings, no approximations. Each step has a deliverable, a deadline, a price.
method.block1_text: You explain your business need. I tell you immediately whether it's feasible, with which technology, and at what price.
method.block2_text: I design and I code. You keep running your business without wasting time in endless meetings. Progress is factual.
method.block3_text: A tested, secure tool that belongs to you 100%. I train you on how to use it, then step back.

solutions.intro: Offers calibrated for real needs. No vague quotes, no price that balloons mid-project.
solutions.card1_desc: A fast website, optimised for mobile and designed to convert visitors into clients.
solutions.card2_desc: Sell your products online (secure Stripe payments) or take appointments synced with your calendar.
solutions.card2_maintenance: 1 year of security updates included, then €100/month
solutions.card3_desc: Development of your back-office. Management dashboards, stock tracking, automated PDF invoicing.
solutions.card3_maintenance: 1 year of security updates included, then €120/month

portfolio.section_title: Four projects opened. Four projects delivered.
portfolio.intro: Applications that were delivered, used, and that work without me standing by to prop them up.
portfolio.project1_desc: Full e-commerce for an afro hair salon. Real-time stock, Stripe payments, Brevo newsletters, admin panel with PDF invoicing and Colissimo export.
portfolio.project2_desc: Artisan leather goods shop. Persistent cart, Stripe, animated delivery tracking timeline, partial refunds and auto-generated PDF invoices.
portfolio.project3_desc: Community anime library. Automated import from MyAnimeList via Jikan API, personal collection with 6 tracking statuses, reviews and ratings.
portfolio.project3_stack: Next.js 16 · Express · PostgreSQL · Prisma · Jikan API
portfolio.project4_desc: Management platform for a local farm cooperative. Weekly baskets, member and producer management, distribution sessions, PDF contracts and newsletters.

about.section_title: A manager's standards. A developer's precision.
about.p1: After 18 years managing teams in the field and running operations, I traded the tie to come back to my real obsession: the pure mechanics of the web.
about.p2: From that first life as a manager, I kept an unsparing lens. I know a business owner has no time for jargon or grand theories — they need tools that work. My eye was trained to spot friction. When I analyse a project, I immediately see what's slowing your clients down, what's weighing on an interface, or what rings false.
about.p3: That's what this Comptoir is built on. I won't make hollow promises. What brings us together is a brief to honour and a result to deliver.
about.p4: We agree on the foundations, I build the architecture, and I don't close my editor until the machine does exactly what was signed. My job is to produce solid code so you can focus on yours.

contact.eyebrow: You have a project. Let's talk.
contact.intro: Describe your need precisely below. If your project falls within my area of expertise, we'll schedule a focused 15-minute call to validate the technical scope.
contact.field_description_placeholder: Be factual: what are the essential features?
